blended.narrative: Tuckerman Ravine is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 623 ft. Looking ahead, 24 inches possible over the next 14 days. Strong winds with gusts to 56 mph may cause lift holds.
